Selected Work

Projects

01 / 03
ChessPlayer
Chess Analysis Platform — v3.0.0

Full-featured chess analysis GUI built from scratch in PySide6/QML. Drag-and-drop board, animated evaluation bar, annotatable PGN editor with dirty-state tracking, and a pre-built position-tree database over a 6M+ game library. Strategic commentary engine backed by Nimzowitsch's classical theory.

Python PySide6 QML SQLite Stockfish UCI Multi-threading
↗ GitHub
02 / 03
FisBot
Fire Inspection Safety Robot

Remotely operated ground vehicle for firefighting reconnaissance. Three-tier embedded architecture: PySide6 laptop GUI, ESP32 WiFi TCP bridge, and Arduino Mega hardware controller over UART. Real-time thermal heatmap overlay for heat signature detection through smoke.

Python PySide6 Arduino C++ ESP32 OpenCV TCP/UART PWM H-Bridge
↗ GitHub
⬡
ESP32 // Arduino Mega
TCP Bridge Architecture
GUI Layer — PySide6
↕ WiFi TCP
ESP32 Bridge

Arduino Mega — Hardware
03 / 03
Egg Timer
Basys-3 FPGA — Verilog / Vivado

4-digit seven-segment countdown timer on a Basys-3 FPGA. 100 MHz clock division to 1 Hz tick, modular FSM design (DisplayController, MessageController, AlphaTo7Segment). Simulated and validated in Vivado with hardware verification via onboard I/O.

Verilog Vivado Basys-3 FPGA FSM Design Clock Division
↗ GitHub
// Egg Timer — Basys-3 FPGA // Cole Foster, Jan 2024 module DisplayController ( input wire clk, input wire rst, input wire [15:0] bcd_in, output reg [6:0] seg, output reg [3:0] an ); reg [17:0] refresh_cnt; reg [1:0] digit_sel; always @(posedge clk) begin if (rst) refresh_cnt <= 0; else refresh_cnt <= refresh_cnt + 1; end assign digit_sel = refresh_cnt[17:16]; always @(*) begin case (digit_sel) 2'b00: an = 4'b1110; 2'b01: an = 4'b1101; 2'b10: an = 4'b1011; 2'b11: an = 4'b0111; endcase end endmodule
